description: Simple evaluation rules for generated scenarios. Applied in order; first match wins.

rules.message: Early retirement path! You could retire before 50.
rules.hint: Consider exploring variations: earlier exit, sabbatical, or increased flexibility.

rules.message: You're on track for retirement in your 50s.
rules.hint: Small changes to income or expenses could bring this even earlier.

rules.message: Retirement likely at or after age 67.
rules.hint: Consider increasing income, reducing expenses, or saving more upfront.
You'll need to increase income, reduce expenses, or save more to sustain retirement.

default_verdict.hint: Adjust sliders in What-If Explorer to explore variations and refine your plan.

notes: Future: Replace with AI agent evaluation to discover novel insights
